categories.name: Chocolate
categories.note: ~150 to 250 mg per serving of dark chocolate

content_blocks.body_md:
Theobromine is caffeine's gentler cousin and the molecule that gives chocolate
its lift. Named for the cacao tree (Theobroma, food of the gods), it clears the
body more slowly than caffeine, and the dose in dark chocolate is enough to
poison a dog.

why_it_matters.text: Chocolate's gentle stimulant, a milder cousin of caffeine that gives cocoa its lingering lift and faint bitterness.
